pending.description:
The best GTA 5 Funny Moments, Stunts, Memes, Fails, Thug Life Moments and Epic Wins to watch before GTA 6!
► SUBSCRIBE FOR MORE GTA V FAILS & WINS! http://bit.ly/TeamRedArcade
✦ Submit YOUR GTA 5 Funny Moments! https://redarcade.com/submit

Here's the best GTA 5 Funny Moments, Stunts & Memes Before GTA 6 (Grand Theft Auto VI Trailer 3 soon)! This video is jam-packed with the best GTA 5 funny/wtf moments, fails, bugs/glitches, epic wins, and even some thug life & GTA RP moments that you can enjoy while waiting for GTA 6! Hours went into the making of this video, so hopefully you enjoyed it and if you did a like would be great appreciated! Don't forget to subscribe for upcoming GTA 6 videos when that releases :)
